title: Enchanting opera duo to woo Plett audiences
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Opera Angels, a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Opera Angels, a duo of soprano and mezzo soprano, will be enchanting music lovers in Plettenberg Bay with a diverse programme, including an introduction to opera, an evening of cinema greats, and a taste of Italy.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Opera Angels, a duo of soprano and mezzo soprano, will be enchanting music lovers in Plettenberg Bay with a diverse programme, including an introduction to opera, an evening of cinema greats, and a taste of Italy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Lisa Engelbrecht, soprano and pianist, and Lindsay Thomson, mezzo soprano, will perform two shows on Friday and Saturday, 2 and 3 February at the St Peter's Anglican Church Hall in Plettenberg Bay, starting at 18:30.","html":"Dr Lisa Engelbrecht, soprano and pianist, and Lindsay Thomson, mezzo soprano, will perform two shows on Friday and Saturday, 2 and 3 February at the St Peter's Anglican Church Hall in Plettenberg Bay, starting at 18:30."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The performances are in aid of PlettAid."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Opera Angels are a diverse and exciting duo based in South Africa who bring their audiences not only much-loved opera classics, but also their own stunning arrangements of iconic pieces through the ages.","html":"Opera Angels are a diverse and exciting duo based in South Africa who bring their audiences not only much-loved opera classics, but also their own stunning arrangements of iconic pieces through the ages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lisa is a renowned musician whose work has taken her all over the world. She combines being operatic vocal coach at the prestigious UCT Opera School with her performing career as a collaborative pianist and soprano.","html":"Lisa is a renowned musician whose work has taken her all over the world. She combines being operatic vocal coach at the prestigious UCT Opera School with her performing career as a collaborative pianist and soprano."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lisa has coached at Opera National du Rhin, Biritish Youth Opera and the Grange Festival, to name but a few.","html":"Lisa has coached at Opera National du Rhin, Biritish Youth Opera and the Grange Festival, to name but a few."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She has recently been in Charlotte, North Carolina to coach young performers at the International Lyric Academy.Dr Lisa Engelbrecht","html":"She has recently been in Charlotte, North Carolina to coach young performers at the International Lyric Academy.Dr Lisa Engelbrecht"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lindsay has also worked in South Africa and Europe as part of opera companies and with her own classical crossover shows.","html":"Lindsay has also worked in South Africa and Europe as part of opera companies and with her own classical crossover shows."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Highlights include tours and local productions with Cape Town Opera as well as being a guest performer on a number of wonderful ships.Lindsay Thomson","html":"Highlights include tours and local productions with Cape Town Opera as well as being a guest performer on a number of wonderful ships.Lindsay Thomson"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following their debut performances on the Queen Victoria ship in early 2019, Opera Angels have been in demand across Cape Town and the rest of South Africa.","html":"Following their debut performances on the Queen Victoria ship in early 2019, Opera Angels have been in demand across Cape Town and the rest of South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lisa and Lindsay are both thrilled to return to Plett for the two new programmes, marking the start of a busy few months.","html":"Lisa and Lindsay are both thrilled to return to Plett for the two new programmes, marking the start of a busy few months."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They head to Mauritus in March for a series of concerts before returning to Durban and Johannesburg. Tickets are available at Market Square Info Centre (044 533 3219 - cash only) or online at Quicket.","html":"They head to Mauritus in March for a series of concerts before returning to Durban and Johannesburg. Tickets are available at Market Square Info Centre (044 533 3219 - cash only) or online at Quicket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
